title: Google India Search
subtitle: Reimagining search for India's next billion users.
problem_statement: Current Google.com landing page, while clean, offers limited proactive discovery for diverse Indian users.

pillars.title: Information Access
pillars.insight: Users seek quick, reliable answers via simple text input.

pillars.title: Digital Literacy
pillars.insight: Many new users might find text-only input challenging.

pillars.title: Local Relevance
pillars.insight: Generic UI doesn't highlight local content options.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: HMW make search more intuitive for new internet users?
HMW help users discover local, relevant information easily?
HMW integrate vernacular content seamlessly into search?

points.name: Google
points.desc: High ease of use, moderate contextual relevance.

points.name: Bing
points.desc: Good ease of use, moderate contextual relevance.

points.name: DuckDuckGo
points.desc: Moderate ease of use, lower contextual relevance.

points.name: Justdial
points.desc: Specific use case, high local relevance.

solution.name: Proposed Solution
solution.desc: Targeting high ease of use and high contextual relevance.

personas.name: Ravi Kumar
personas.quote: I need quick info for my shop, preferably in Hindi.
personas.bio: Ravi uses a smartphone for business, struggles with English text, prefers voice input.

personas.name: Priya Sharma
personas.quote: I want to find trending local events quickly.
personas.bio: Priya is tech-savvy, uses multiple apps, seeks efficient, visual information discovery.

insights: "How do I type this in Hindi?"
"Is there a simpler way to find things?"
Types short queries into search bar.

points.action: Replace text input with voice/visual search icons.
points.benefit: Enhances accessibility for diverse user literacy levels.

points.action: Integrate local service quick links on the homepage.
points.benefit: Provides direct access to popular local services.

points.action: Tailor homepage language options more prominently.
points.benefit: Makes language selection intuitive and highly visible.

points.action: Enhance search bar with contextual suggestions.
points.benefit: Guides users to relevant queries proactively.

pivot.before: Plain text input on a minimalist search page.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from passive keyword input to proactive, multi-modal discovery.
pivot.after: Visually rich, context-aware, and accessible search entry point.

stages.actions: Types text into the search field.

annotations.title: Voice Input Icon
annotations.rationale: Enables natural language queries for low-literacy users.

annotations.title: Local Quick Links
annotations.rationale: Provides direct access to popular local services.

annotations.title: Prominent Language
annotations.rationale: Makes language selection more intuitive and visible.

data.finding: System status clear via search bar focus.
Minimal input fields reduce error potential.
Offers language options, but input method is singular.
